privileged_info_summary: The TailwindTraders project exists in the Azure DevOps environment. The metadata claims incomplete story titles ('Implement product inventory search' and 'Design REST API rate limiting') which are verified to exist as 'Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering' and 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware' in work_items.json. However, the metadata bug titles are contradicted by actual data: metadata lists 'Product price calculation bug', 'Inventory count goes negative', and 'API 500 error on special chars', but the seeded work items contain 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers', 'Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests', and 'API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name'. These are completely different titles that would not match in an exact title search. The feature 'Product Inventory Management' and tasks 'Set up Elasticsearch index for products' and 'Build search API endpoint' are synthetic items required to be created by the agent and do not exist in source data.
